summary: Recent changes to the Encrypted Media Extensions (EME) in Firefox have improved how the browser handles promises related to Digital Rights Management (DRM) through the MediaKeys API. Specifically, resetting the create-promise identifier after it is settled ensures better management and tracking of DRM licenses. This adjustment is important as it enhances the reliability of streaming services that rely on EME for secure playback of protected content, making for a smoother user experience when watching movies or shows online. **With these improvements, users can expect more consistent playback behavior when accessing DRM-protected media.**
